channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Texans and Latino doubts about Trump complicate Paxton's Senate campaign
item.description: Texas has added over 2.5 million residents since 2020, roughly the population of New Mexico, reshaping the electorate and introducing...

item.title: AI is transforming energy into America's hottest business sector
item.description: The AI boom is driving companies from tech giants to automakers into the energy business, as demand for power surges.

item.title: Trump requests changes to Iran deal his envoys negotiated
item.description: President Trump asked for several amendments to the deal his envoys reached with Iranian counterparts during a Situation Room meeting on Friday.

item.title: GOP's anti-woke strategy faces key test in Texas Senate race
item.description: The Texas Senate race tests whether anti-woke politics still resonates with voters amid the current political climate.
